Ecolistic Cleaning Employment Application

* Indicates required question
Email *
Your email address
Our logo- a green earth needs clean water. We do our part to preserve the environment by using all non-toxic and biodegradable cleaning products.
Before you begin, please take into consideration:
This application is for serious inquiries only. 

We are hiring for a long-term crew member who will enjoy the physically intense work of house cleaning. We require that all employees have a valid MD drivers license and a reliable, insured vehicle. We are seeing someone who can be a reliable addition to Ecolistic. 

We invest a lot of energy and resources into onboarding, in an effort to have new Natural Cleaning Specialists feel well-prepared to begin their work greening the world one eco-conscious cleaning at a time. 

If you do not think that you can take be a consistently efficient communicator, be a reliable/timely co-worker, clean with mindfulness while being very detail-oriented, and have an interest to be a long-term addition to our hard-working green cleaning team, PLEASE save us all the time and consider looking for a different option for employment. 

If you ARE very interested in this position (and complete this application and email us your resume), please keep AN EYE ON YOUR EMAIL because, if you meet our qualifications, we will be sending you an email for an in-person interview.

A sincere thank you for your consideration.

Please include CITY and STATE, as we operate in Delaware and Maryland.

How long have you lived at your current address? *

Do you have a social security number? *
Due to our payroll requirements, it is required to have a SS# to work for Ecolistic Cleaning. 
If offered a position with Ecolistic, you will be required to complete the form I-9 (Employment Eligibility Verification form from the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services), as well as show a non-expired original document that establishes both identity and employment authorization. 
Are you at least 21 years old? *
Do you have a valid US driver's license? *
If you answered no to the above question:
please note, this position requires  employees to have a valid driver's license AND their own working, reliable vehicle. Please email us an explanation of why you are seeking an exception to our pre-qualifications and still wish to to apply for the position at info@ecolisticcleaning.com.
If hired, do you have a reliable means of transportation to get to work? (We do require all Natural Cleaning Specialists to have their own mode of reliable transportation. Unfortunately, public transportation does not work well in our Anne Arundel County and Delaware Divisions.) *
Driver's license state of issue:
Your answer
Do you speak fluent English? *
Is there anything that would prevent you from being physically able to perform the tasks required for this position including but not limited to kneeling, scrubbing, carrying, and medium-high intensity lifting? *
If you answered yes to the above question, please explain.
Your answer
Please describe your type of transportation (year, make/model). *

Have you had any moving violations during the past three years? *
Have you ever been convicted of a crime? *
If yes, please list the number of convictions, nature of offense(s) leading to conviction(s), how recently such offense(s) was/were committed, sentence(s) imposed, and type(s) of rehabilitation.
Your answer

If we don't already have it, please email us a current resume to: info@ecolisticcleaning.com.
Please include your work experience from the past five years beginning with your most recent job held on your resume. If you were self-employed, please provide that detailed information.
Your answer

I understand that for my application to be considered, I still need to email my current resume directly to: info@ecolisticcleaning.com. 
I certify that the information provided in this application, as well as on my submitted resume, is true and correct.  *
Required
An application form sometimes makes it difficult for an individual to adequately summarize a complete background. Please use the space below to summarize any additional information necessary to describe your full qualifications for cleaning with Ecolistic.
Your answer
APPLICATION FORM WAIVER: Please read the statement below. Please type your name as your e-signature as confirmation that you have read and agree to the waiver. *
In exchange for the consideration of my job application by Ecolistic Cleaning, I agree that: neither the acceptance of this application nor the subsequent entry into any type of employment relationship, either in the position applied for or any other position, and regardless of the contents of employee training packets, employment agreements, policy statements, and the like as they may exist from time to time, or other company practices, shall serve to create an actual or implied contract of employment, or to confer any right to remain an employee of Ecolistic Cleaning, or otherwise to change in any respect the employment-at-will relationship between it and the undersigned and that the relationship cannot be altered except by a written instrument signed by the owner or manager of Ecolistic Cleaning. Both the undersigned and Ecolistic Cleaning may end the employment relationship at any time, without specified notice or reason. If employed, I understand that Ecolistic Cleaning may unilaterally change or revise their benefits, policies and procedures and such changes may include reduction in benefits. I authorize investigation of all statements contained in this application. I understand that the misrepresentation or omission of facts called for is cause for dismissal at any time without any previous notice. I hereby give Ecolistic Cleaning permission to contact schools, previous employers (unless otherwise indicated), references, and others, and hereby release Ecolistic Cleaning from any liability as a result of such contract. I also understand that (1) Ecolistic Cleaning has a drug and alcohol policy that may provide for pre-employment testing as well as testing after employment, if drug theft is suspected; (2) consent to and compliance with such policy is a condition of my employment; and (3) continued employment is based on the successful passing of testing under such policy. I further understand that continued employment may be based on the successful passing of job-related physical examinations. I understand that, in connection with the routine processing of your employment application, Ecolistic Cleaning may request from a consumer reporting agency an investigative consumer report including information as to my credit records, character, general reputation, personal characteristics, and mode of living. Upon written request from me, Ecolistic Cleaning, will provide me with additional information concerning the nature and scope of any such report requested by it, as required by the Fair Credit Reporting Act. I further understand that my employment with Ecolistic Cleaning shall be a trail position for a period of ninety (90) days, and further that at any time during the introductory period or thereafter, my employment relation with Ecolistic Cleaning is terminable at will for any reason by either party. Ecolistic Cleaning is an equal employment opportunity employer. We adhere to a policy of making employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship, age, or disability. We assure you that your opportunity for employment with Ecolistic Cleaning depends solely on your qualifications. 

Please type your name as your e-signature.
Your answer
Date: *
DD
/
MM
/
YYYY
Thank you for your interest in employment with Ecolistic Cleaning and completing this application! We look forward to reviewing your application and reading over your resume.

REMEMBER: check your email regularly for an invite to interview with us!

Please allow us 2 business days to read through your application and get back to you, via email, to let you know if we are hiring and would like to schedule a phone or in-person interview. 

We’ll do our best to email you within 48 hours (outside of weekends and U.S. holidays). If you do not hear from us within 3 business days, feel free to reach back out to: info@ecolisticcleaning.com or #888-4-ECOLISTIC.
